BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Power</>

Your <stronger>Power</> is a measure of your overall combat effectiveness and is calculated by the following.

1. <stronger>F.O.R.T Attributes</>  awarded when gaining <stronger>Homebase Levels</>.

2. <stronger>Commander Rating</> and <stronger>Support Hero Rating</> in your current <stronger>Hero Loadout</>.

3. <stronger>F.O.R.T Attributes</> determined by the ratings of your <stronger>Survivors</> in your <stronger>Survivor Squads</>. 

4. Your three highest rated <stronger>Schematics</> or <stronger>Weapons</> in your backpack.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Power</>

Your <stronger>Power</> is a measure of your overall combat effectiveness and is calculated by the following.

1. <stronger>F.O.R.T Attributes</>  awarded when gaining <stronger>Homebase Levels</>.

2. <stronger>Commander Rating</> and <stronger>Support Hero Rating</> in your current <stronger>Hero Loadout</>.

3. <stronger>F.O.R.T Attributes</> determined by the ratings of your <stronger>Survivors</> in your <stronger>Survivor Squads</>. 

4. Your three highest rated <stronger>Schematics</> or <stronger>Weapons</> in your backpack.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>XP Boosts</>

When an <stronger>XP Boost</> is active, you will receive <stronger>Homebase XP</> at an increased rate.  There are two different ways to boost your XP: You can apply an XP Boost from the <stronger>Profile</> menu, or you can be boosted by (or send a boost to) a <stronger>teammate</>.

Additionally, everyone receives <stronger>Daily Bonus XP</> just for playing the game.  Every point of XP you earn will be doubled until your Daily Bonus XP is exhausted, and the boost resets once per day.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>XP Boosts</>

When an <stronger>XP Boost</> is active, you will receive <stronger>Homebase XP</> at an increased rate.  There are two different ways to boost your XP: You can apply an XP Boost from the <stronger>Profile</> menu, or you can be boosted by (or send a boost to) a <stronger>teammate</>.

Additionally, everyone receives <stronger>Daily Bonus XP</> just for playing the game.  Every point of XP you earn will be doubled until your Daily Bonus XP is exhausted, and the boost resets once per day.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Gadgets</>

Earn <stronger>Homebase XP</> by completing quests, side missions, and earning badges in game. The more activities your team completes within a mission, the more XP you will receive. Every time you fill up your <stronger>Homebase XP</> bar, you gain a <stronger>Homebase Level</>. 

Upon reaching specific <stronger>Homebase Levels</>, new <stronger>Gadgets</> will be awarded and existing <stronger>Gadgets</> will be leveled up.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Gadgets</>

Earn <stronger>Homebase XP</> by completing quests, side missions, and earning badges in game. The more activities your team completes within a mission, the more XP you will receive. Every time you fill up your <stronger>Homebase XP</> bar, you gain a <stronger>Homebase Level</>. 

Upon reaching specific <stronger>Homebase Levels</>, new <stronger>Gadgets</> will be awarded and existing <stronger>Gadgets</> will be leveled up.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Ventures</>

Welcome to the <stronger>Venture Zone!</> Complete <stronger>Venture Zone</> missions to earn exclusive rewards. This <stronger>Venture Zone</> is only available for a limited time, so dive in while you can!

You can use your heroes and trap schematics in the <stronger>Venture Zone</> but your normal inventory won't be available. Make sure to find and repair weapons when facing new challenges in the <stronger>Venture Zone!</>

Earn <stronger>Venture XP</> by completing missions in the zone. Every level gives a reward!

Your <stronger>Venture Level</> determines your power level and <stronger>F.O.R.T. Stats</> within the zone. No need to worry about <stronger>Hero Rating</>, <stronger>Survivors</>, <stronger>Schematics</>, or the  <stronger>Weapons</> in your backpack!
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Ventures</>

Welcome to the <stronger>Venture Zone!</> Complete <stronger>Venture Zone</> missions to earn exclusive rewards. This <stronger>Venture Zone</> is only available for a limited time, so dive in while you can!

You can use your heroes and trap schematics in the <stronger>Venture Zone</> but your normal inventory won't be available. Make sure to find and repair weapons when facing new challenges in the <stronger>Venture Zone!</>

Earn <stronger>Venture XP</> by completing missions in the zone. Every level gives a reward!

Your <stronger>Venture Level</> determines your power level and <stronger>F.O.R.T. Stats</> within the zone. No need to worry about <stronger>Hero Rating</>, <stronger>Survivors</>, <stronger>Schematics</>, or the  <stronger>Weapons</> in your backpack!

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Hero Loadout</>

Select and assign a <stronger>Hero</> as your <stronger>Commander</> for your next mission. Up to 5 <stronger>Heroes</> can be assigned to the <stronger>Support Team</> and each of them adds 8% of their health, shield and ability damage stats to your <stronger>Commander</>.

<Heading>Hero Perks</>

The <stronger>Commander</> and each member of the <stronger>Support Team</> have <stronger>Hero Perks</> that may boost the <stronger>Commander's</> combat performance in different ways.

<Heading>Team Perk</>

Assign a <stronger>Team Perk</> to the <stronger>Team Perk Slot</> to further improve your <stronger>Commander's</> combat performance. With the right <stronger>Heroes</> assigned to the <stronger>Support Team</>, the bonuses granted by the <stronger>Team Perk</> can be further increased.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Hero Loadout</>

Select and assign a <stronger>Hero</> as your <stronger>Commander</> for your next mission. Up to 5 <stronger>Heroes</> can be assigned to the <stronger>Support Team</> and each of them adds 8% of their health, shield and ability damage stats to your <stronger>Commander</>.

<Heading>Hero Perks</>

The <stronger>Commander</> and each member of the <stronger>Support Team</> have <stronger>Hero Perks</> that may boost the <stronger>Commander's</> combat performance in different ways.

<Heading>Team Perk</>

Assign a <stronger>Team Perk</> to the <stronger>Team Perk Slot</> to further improve your <stronger>Commander's</> combat performance. With the right <stronger>Heroes</> assigned to the <stronger>Support Team</>, the bonuses granted by the <stronger>Team Perk</> can be further increased.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Defenders</>

Need a hand on your current mission? <stronger>Defenders</> can be summoned during the mission to fill in for any missing players in your party to help take out those pesky husks.

Build <stronger>Defender Pads</> while you're in a mission, then activate them to call a <stronger>Defender</>. In a Storm Shield Defense mission, you can summon additional <stronger>Defenders</> to create a small army!
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Defenders</>

Need a hand on your current mission? <stronger>Defenders</> can be summoned during the mission to fill in for any missing players in your party to help take out those pesky husks.

Build <stronger>Defender Pads</> while you're in a mission, then activate them to call a <stronger>Defender</>. In a Storm Shield Defense mission, you can summon additional <stronger>Defenders</> to create a small army!

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Survivor Squads</>

Add <stronger>Survivors</> to your <stronger>Survivor Squads</> to increase your <stronger>Power</> and <stronger>F.O.R.T. Attributes</>. The more powerful the <stronger>Survivor</>, the more they benefit your squad. Level up and evolve your <stronger>Survivors</> to increase their power! 

Match Leaders to their <stronger>Job Type</> and <stronger>Squad Personalities</>, and pair up <stronger>Survivors</> with similar <stronger>Traits</> to gain additional bonuses.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Survivor Squads</>

Add <stronger>Survivors</> to your <stronger>Survivor Squads</> to increase your <stronger>Power</> and <stronger>F.O.R.T. Attributes</>. The more powerful the <stronger>Survivor</>, the more they benefit your squad. Level up and evolve your <stronger>Survivors</> to increase their power! 

Match Leaders to their <stronger>Job Type</> and <stronger>Squad Personalities</>, and pair up <stronger>Survivors</> with similar <stronger>Traits</> to gain additional bonuses.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Expedition Squads</>

Don’t leave your <Heading>Heroes standing around idle, send them on an <stronger>Expedition</> and watch the rewards roll in!

Select an <stronger>Expedition</> with rewards you like.

Choose <stronger>Heroes</> to send on your selected <stronger>Expedition</>. The chance of success depends on how the combined <stronger>Power</> of the <stronger>Heroes</> match with the <stronger>Expedition</> requirements.

Your <stronger>Heroes</> will return later with rewards! 

<stronger>Heroes on an Expedition will be unavailable elsewhere until they return.</>
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Expedition Squads</>

Don’t leave your <Heading>Heroes standing around idle, send them on an <stronger>Expedition</> and watch the rewards roll in!

Select an <stronger>Expedition</> with rewards you like.

Choose <stronger>Heroes</> to send on your selected <stronger>Expedition</>. The chance of success depends on how the combined <stronger>Power</> of the <stronger>Heroes</> match with the <stronger>Expedition</> requirements.

Your <stronger>Heroes</> will return later with rewards! 

<stronger>Heroes on an Expedition will be unavailable elsewhere until they return.</>

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Schematics</>

<stronger>Schematics</> give you the ability to <stronger>craft items</> that can be used on missions.

Level up and evolve your schematics to increase the power of crafted items and unlock their <stronger>special perks</>.

Keep in mind that items from evolved schematics require rarer resources to craft.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Schematics</>

<stronger>Schematics</> give you the ability to <stronger>craft items</> that can be used on missions.

Level up and evolve your schematics to increase the power of crafted items and unlock their <stronger>special perks</>.

Keep in mind that items from evolved schematics require rarer resources to craft.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Collection Book</>

Move extra people and schematics to your <stronger>Collection Book</> to earn <stronger>Collection Book XP</>.
Items in the <stronger>Collection Book</> can be leveled up and evolved for additional <stronger>Collection Book XP</>.
Collect rewards every time the <stronger>Collection Book</> levels up!

You can spend <stronger>Flux</> to unslot items from the <stronger>Collection Book</> and return them to your <stronger>Armory</>, but you will lose <stronger>Collection Book XP</> when you unslot items.

New heroes can be recruited from the <stronger>Collection Book</> with <stronger>Flux</> and <stronger>People Manuals</>. 
New schematics can be researched from the <stronger>Collection Book</> with <stronger>Flux</> and <stronger>Schematic Designs</>.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Collection Book</>

Move extra people and schematics to your <stronger>Collection Book</> to earn <stronger>Collection Book XP</>.
Items in the <stronger>Collection Book</> can be leveled up and evolved for additional <stronger>Collection Book XP</>.
Collect rewards every time the <stronger>Collection Book</> levels up!

You can spend <stronger>Flux</> to unslot items from the <stronger>Collection Book</> and return them to your <stronger>Armory</>, but you will lose <stronger>Collection Book XP</> when you unslot items.

New heroes can be recruited from the <stronger>Collection Book</> with <stronger>Flux</> and <stronger>People Manuals</>. 
New schematics can be researched from the <stronger>Collection Book</> with <stronger>Flux</> and <stronger>Schematic Designs</>.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Storage</>

If you earn items as a mission reward, or collect resources on an Expedition, but don't have room in your backpack, items will instead be placed in <stronger>Storage</>.

As long as there is open room, you can move items freely between your backpack and your Storage. You will unlock more storage space as you gain <stronger>Homebase Levels</>.

Your <stronger>Storage</> can also be accessed from your <stronger>Storm Shield</>.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Storage</>

If you earn items as a mission reward, or collect resources on an Expedition, but don't have room in your backpack, items will instead be placed in <stronger>Storage</>.

As long as there is open room, you can move items freely between your backpack and your Storage. You will unlock more storage space as you gain <stronger>Homebase Levels</>.

Your <stronger>Storage</> can also be accessed from your <stronger>Storm Shield</>.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Quest Log</>

Your <stronger>Quest Log</> keeps a record of all your current quests and challenges, including those that you have completed in the past.

Complete quests to earn rewards, including special event exclusive or limited time rewards.

<stronger>Pin Quests</> to track your progress in game.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Quest Log</>

Your <stronger>Quest Log</> keeps a record of all your current quests and challenges, including those that you have completed in the past.

Complete quests to earn rewards, including special event exclusive or limited time rewards.

<stronger>Pin Quests</> to track your progress in game.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Daily Quests</>

Every day, you are assigned a <stronger>Daily Quest</>. Completing the <stronger>Daily Quest</> will reward you with <stronger>X-Ray Tickets</> or <stronger>V-bucks</> and <stronger>Gold</>.

You can have up to 3 active <stronger>Daily Quests</> at a time and you can abandon 1 per day if you want to try something new.

In order to get new <stronger>Daily Quests</>, you'll need to complete your active quests.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Daily Quests</>

Every day, you are assigned a <stronger>Daily Quest</>. Completing the <stronger>Daily Quest</> will reward you with <stronger>X-Ray Tickets</> or <stronger>V-bucks</> and <stronger>Gold</>.

You can have up to 3 active <stronger>Daily Quests</> at a time and you can abandon 1 per day if you want to try something new.

In order to get new <stronger>Daily Quests</>, you'll need to complete your active quests.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Challenges</>

<stronger>Challenges</> are special, repeatable quests that increase in difficulty every time you complete them.

Each <stronger>Challenge</> quest line has <stronger>20 Stages</> to test your mettle!
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Challenges</>

<stronger>Challenges</> are special, repeatable quests that increase in difficulty every time you complete them.

Each <stronger>Challenge</> quest line has <stronger>20 Stages</> to test your mettle!

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Side Quests</>

<stronger>Side Quests</> are optional quests that you can choose to pursue if you're looking for an extra challenge!

Complete <stronger>Side Quests</> to receive high value rewards like <stronger>X-Ray Tickets</> or <stronger>V-bucks</>.

Each <stronger>Side Quest</> can only be completed once, but completing one may unlock access to a new, more challenging <stronger>Side Quest</>.
BodyText.LocalizedString:
<Heading>Side Quests</>

<stronger>Side Quests</> are optional quests that you can choose to pursue if you're looking for an extra challenge!

Complete <stronger>Side Quests</> to receive high value rewards like <stronger>X-Ray Tickets</> or <stronger>V-bucks</>.

Each <stronger>Side Quest</> can only be completed once, but completing one may unlock access to a new, more challenging <stronger>Side Quest</>.

BodyText.SourceString:
<Heading>Save The World</>

<stronger>If you're out there, we need your help!</>

The storm came, and the monsters followed.  They took everything: our towns, even our families.  The few of us left are in serious danger... 

<stronger>Now it's time to fight back!  All we need is a leader.  And that's you.</>

Sure it'll be dangerous. I mean, yeah, there's monsters (a lot of monsters!) but we've got massive forts, killer traps, and piles of loot.  If we stick together, they don't stand a chance.

<stronger>This is our world, and it's time to take it back!</>
BodyText.LocalizedString:

The storm came, and the monsters followed.  They took everything: our towns, even our families.  The few of us left are in serious danger... 

<stronger>Now it's time to fight back!  All we need is a leader.  And that's you.</>

Sure it'll be dangerous. I mean, yeah, there's monsters (a lot of monsters!) but we've got massive forts, killer traps, and piles of loot.  If we stick together, they don't stand a chance.

<stronger>This is our world, and it's time to take it back!</>
